summary: Tested 4 features for Loans module: 1) Stats cards on Loans page - PASS (all 6 cards showing correct counts), 2) Token refresh endpoint - PASS (returns new valid token), 3) LOAN_EXEC role visibility - PASS (only sees 'loans' tab), 4) Bank seeding - PASS (23 banks seeded including major Indian banks and NBFCs). All 18 backend tests passed.

integration_issues.issue: LOAN_EXEC user is redirected to /leads page after login instead of /loans (their only accessible tab). Should redirect to first visible tab.

action_items: Consider redirecting users to their first visible tab after login (LOAN_EXEC should go to /loans, not /leads)
critical_code_review_comments: Token refresh endpoint correctly implemented at POST /api/auth/refresh-token - returns new JWT with extended expiry
LOAN_EXEC role properly configured in TAB_VISIBILITY with only ['loans'] access
Bank seeding endpoint creates 23 Indian banks/NBFCs with proper eligibility rules
Stats cards on Loans page correctly use stats.total and stats.by_status keys
All stats cards display: Total Leads, Interested, Follow Up, Call Back, Not Interested, With Credit Score
seed_data_creation: Bank seeding endpoint creates/updates 23 Indian banks and NBFCs
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 features tested and working: 1) Stats cards show correct counts (Total Leads: 19, Interested: 3, Follow Up: 2, Call Back: 1, Not Interested: 1, With Credit Score: 1), 2) Token refresh returns new valid JWT, 3) LOAN_EXEC user only sees 'loans' tab in navigation, 4) Bank seeding creates 23 banks including SBI, HDFC, ICICI, Axis, Kotak, Bajaj Finance, Tata Capital, etc.

features_tested.stats_cards_loans_page: PASS - All 6 stats cards displaying with correct counts from stats.total and stats.by_status
features_tested.token_refresh_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/auth/refresh-token returns new valid JWT token
features_tested.loan_exec_visible_tabs: PASS - LOAN_EXEC user only sees ['loans'] in visible_tabs
features_tested.banks_list_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/banks returns all seeded banks with required fields

screenshots_taken: 01_loans_page.png - Loans page with all 6 stats cards showing correct counts
01_loan_exec_after_login.png - LOAN_EXEC user with only Loans tab visible
